case_title: MAN QIONG "KATIE" ZHEN VS. RICHARD PAUL JACKSON

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ZHEN, MAN QIONG "KATIE" AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, RICHARD PAUL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-23-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-23-2021 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO SEP-02-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE, INSUFFICIANT EVIDENCE AT THIS TIME. PLAINTIFF MAN QIONG "KATIE" ZHEN IS PRESENT AND REPRESENTED BY CHARLIE TAMONDDONG, HUSBAND (SPEAKING ON HER BEHALF). DEFENDANT RICHARD PAUL JACKSON IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00); REMARKS: RICHARD PAUL JACKSON CAME TO SAN FRANCISCO CITY HALL AND WAS SERVED SERVED MAY-12-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, RICHARD PAUL
